title: Call of Minecraft
description: This Modpack turns Minecraft In to and FPS.
body:
# This Mod Turns Minecraft In to an First Person Shooter
**I did nothing here besides making the Modpack give me no credit.**

**This mod requires Optifine**
## The Mods/Shaders that is in the pack.
- 3D Skin Layers
- Automobility
- Body Camera Shader
- City Craft
- OptiFine
- Xaero's Minimap
- Timeless and Classics Zero
